audit_items.proof_trace: The check at L433-434 (`if (bidUsdValue < minBidUsdValue) revert BidValueTooLow`) is applied before any state mutation or external call. `s_minBidUsdValue` is always > 0 (enforced at construction and by the setter), and `assetPrice` is validated as non-zero and non-stale via `_getAssetPrice(asset, true)`. No alternative code path exists to participate in an auction without passing through this gate.
